title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at MagicBricks

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at MagicBricks
jsonLd.description:
MagicBricks has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
